info.title: Korb API
info.description: Backend API for Korb meal planning application

get.description: Health check endpoint with database connectivity verification.
Check health of all external services.

Return all rows from the example table (Postgres).
Schema: apps/api/alembic. Seed: pnpm db:seed:postgres.

post.description:
Handle Apify actor completion webhook.

When the swiss-grocery-scraper finishes, it POSTs here.
We then fetch the latest dataset from Apify and ingest it.

delete.description:
Account deletion stub (App Store compliance).

Production: call Clerk Backend API.

get.description: Get personalized recommendations from preference vector.

schema.title: Response Recommended Products Api V1 Products Recommended Get

post.description: Search for multiple queries at once (e.g., a list of ingredients).
Answer a question about products using hybrid search + LLM.

schema.title: Response Get Messages Api V1 Messages Get
Response Get Active Polls Api V1 Polls Active Get

post.description:
Upsert stores from Google Maps actor data.

Uses google_place_id for deduplication. Only accepts places
matching known retailer brands.

get.description: List all stores, optionally filtered by brand.
